## [03:06 - 06:13]

Or you can actually use a custom metric that finds the ratio between landing page views and outbound clicks. So that's just a super simple example. ## [09:16 - 11:36]

So the share to Facebook, to Twitter, to LinkedIn or to email. Once you click that, that executes an event. I put a weight of three on that. Additionally, podcast play.
